headline: Applied Materials Just Ripped 55% in a Month. Is It Time to Sell?
summary: Applied Materials (NASDAQ:AMAT) stock is ripping again. Shares are up 11% today to $697.61 in Monday trading, marking a fresh high, after KeyBanc Capital Markets issued a bullish early note ahead of the company’s Q3 FY2026 earnings report. The pop extends an already historic run. Applied Materials stock is up 55.61% over the past month, ... Applied Materials Just Ripped 55% in a Month. Is It Time to Sell?

headline: Applied Materials (AMAT) Joins Russell Top 50 After Leaving Value Indexes
summary: Applied Materials (NasdaqGS:AMAT) was removed from several Russell Value indexes and added to the Russell Top 50 Index. The move reflects recent product developments in AI oriented semiconductor manufacturing and a shift in how the company is categorized by index providers. These index changes can affect which funds hold the stock, how capital tracks it, and the level of market attention it receives. Applied Materials is a key supplier of equipment used to produce advanced chips, including...

headline: US stocks rise and recover some of their losses from a rare losing week
summary: U.S. stocks rose Monday and recovered some of their losses from a rare losing week.  The S&P 500 climbed 1.2% and broke a five-day losing streak.  The Dow Jones Industrial Average added 306 points, or 0.6%, and the Nasdaq composite rallied 2.1%.
